name: I'm scared to file for my forklift injury because I think my boss will fire me. Are there protections for workers?
description: It is illegal to fire an employee specifically for filing a workers comp claim. If you are injured and can't work, you are entitled to benefits, and retaliation

mainEntity.name: I'm scared to file for my forklift injury because I think my boss will fire me. Are there protections for workers?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is illegal to fire an employee specifically for filing a workers comp claim. If you are injured and can't work, you are entitled to benefits, and retaliation can lead to a wrongful termination lawsuit.
